subcodes.first_line: O Guardian of the Threshold of the Almighty! The eloquent letter—even as the warbling of a nightingale in the rose-garden—hath reached Me and brought gladness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پاسبان آستان یزدان نامه بلیغ یعنی گلبانگ بلبل گلشن واصل گشت و سبب شادمانی
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @call to action
